# awscc_directconnect_direct_connect_gateway (List Resource)

List all resources for `AWS::DirectConnect::DirectConnectGateway` resource type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "awscc_directconnect_direct_connect_gateway" "example" {
  provider = awscc
}
```
